initialState.content:
-- Mission 10 Guidelines
-- Step 1: compute customer spend by region
-- Step 2: compute region_total using window SUM over region
-- Step 3: percentage = total_spend * 100.0 / region_total

WITH customer_spend AS (
  SELECT
    c.region,
    c.name,
    SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS total_spend
  FROM customers c
  INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
  INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
  INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY c.region, c.name
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    region,
    name,
    total_spend,
    -- TODO region total window
  FROM customer_spend
)
SELECT
  region,
  name,
  total_spend,
  -- TODO contribution percent
FROM ranked
ORDER BY region, total_spend DESC;

rules: must_include:sum(total_spend) over (partition by region) as region_total
